items.title: Nets destroy Kings 115-83. Sac at least got good games from draft picks Acuff and Sharp, who combined for more than half their points. As for Karaban .... yikes.

items.title: The Sacramento Kings signed Emanuel Sharp to a three-year, $6.35 million deal, which includes two fully guaranteed years, league sources told HoopsHype. Sharp was the 45th pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Agent Alex Saratsis of Octagon finalized the deal.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Sacramento Kings signed Emanuel Sharp to a three-year, $6.35 million deal, which includes two fully guaranteed years, league sources told HoopsHype. Sharp was the 45th pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Agent Alex Saratsis of Octagon finalized the deal.

items.title: Houston's Emanuel Sharp worked out for the Pacers nearly a month ago even though they didn't have a pick in this draft. If the Pacers trade back into the 2nd round of this week's draft in the 30s, he could be the kind of player they target: www.indystar.com/story/sports...
